title: Dubai launches first AI-powered smart bus station at Mall of the Emirates with 24/7 digital services
summary_full: Dubai has launched its first fully integrated smart bus station at Mall of the Emirates, enhancing commuter experience with AI and digital services. This futuristic hub connects directly to the Metro, serving 11 bus routes and improving connectivity across the emirate. The station signifies Dubai's commitment to modernizing public transport with smart infrastructure.
